name: Nextdoor Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Nextdoor is the essential neighborhood network connecting over 105 million Verified Neighbors 1 to the people, places, and information that matter most in their local communities. Operating in over 350,000 neighborhoods across 11 countries, Nextdoor fosters trusted, real-world utility through locally relevant content and services, including news, real-time safety alerts, neighbor recommendations, for sale and free listings, and events.
